result.summary: Implemented Deep Trust Blue design system: Color.kt rewritten with full M3 palette, Type.kt with refined scale + amount styles, Dimensions.kt with spacing/radius/elevation tokens, Theme.kt with FinanceColors CompositionLocal, XML resources for splash/dark mode.
